title: selaginella salazariae
intro: Selaginella salazariae, also known as Mexican spikemoss, is a type of plant belonging to the Selaginella genus, which is a group of evergreen, lepidote vascular plants. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been reported to have potential health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues. Selaginella salazariae is typically prepared as a tea or infused in water to release its active compounds, and it is also used in some herbal supplements and remedies. While more research is needed to confirm its efficacy, traditional use and anecdotal evidence suggest that Selaginella salazariae may offer relief from various health conditions.
